channel.title: Sqlite on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Sqlite on Arrans github.io

item.title: usememos/memos
item.description: Open-source, self-hosted note-taking tool built for quick capture. Markdown-native, lightweight, and fully yours.

item.title: Maxteabag/sqlit
item.description: A user friendly TUI for SQL databases. Written in python. Supports SQL server, Mysql, PostreSQL, SQLite, Turso and more.

item.title: dbgate/dbgate
item.description: Database manager for MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQL Server, MongoDB, SQLite and others. Runs under Windows, Linux, Mac or as web application

item.title: teableio/teable
item.description: ✨ The Next Gen Airtable Alternative: No-Code Postgres

item.title: nocodb/nocodb
item.description: 🔥 🔥 🔥 A Free & Self-hostable Airtable Alternative

item.title: chartdb/chartdb
item.description: Database diagrams editor that allows you to visualize and design your DB with a single query.

item.title: pawelsalawa/sqlitestudio
item.description: A free, open source, multi-platform SQLite database manager.

item.title: David-Crty/databasement
item.description: Self-hosted database backup manager with a web UI. Schedule, backup, and restore MySQL, PostgreSQL, MariaDB, MongoDB, SQLite & Redis to S3, SFTP, or local storage. SSH Tunnel support.

item.title: golang-migrate/migrate
item.description: Database migrations. CLI and Golang library.

item.title: rqlite/rqlite
item.description: The lightweight, fault-tolerant database built on SQLite. Designed to keep your data highly available with minimal effort.

item.title: dbeaver/dbeaver
item.description: Free universal database tool and SQL client

item.title: saulpw/visidata
item.description: A terminal spreadsheet multitool for discovering and arranging data

item.title: mattn/go-sqlite3
item.description: sqlite3 driver for go using database/sql

item.title: oldany/dropmind
item.description: Self-hosted capture layer to save anything from anywhere.

item.title: zen-logic/file-hunter
item.description: File Hunter — catalog, deduplicate, and consolidate your archive storage

item.title: simolus3/drift
item.description: Drift is an easy to use, reactive, typesafe persistence library for Dart & Flutter.

item.title: nalgeon/sqlean
item.description: The ultimate set of SQLite extensions

item.title: superfly/litefs
item.description: FUSE-based file system for replicating SQLite databases across a cluster of machines

item.title: nalgeon/redka
item.description: Redis re-implemented with SQL

item.title: dolmen-go/sqlar
item.description: Go library to access SQLite Archives Files

item.title: cvilsmeier/go-sqlite-bench
item.description: Benchmarks for Golang SQLite Drivers

item.title: zombiezen/go-sqlite
item.description: Low-level Go interface to SQLite 3

item.title: VityaSchel/lufin
item.description: Read-only mirror of https://git.hloth.dev/hloth/lufin

item.title: nafey/minimalytics
item.description: Standalone analytics app in a CLI
